title: Vanilla Evolved - Iridescent Diamonds
description: Vanilla Evolved's diamond textures recolored to be much more vibrant and unique!
body:
Vanilla Evolved's diamond textures recolored to be much more vibrant and unique! Also includes textures for the diamond and diamond block, as well as diamond horse armor and armor trim color palettes.

Credit to [Vixel](https://modrinth.com/user/Vixel) for the original resource pack.

Vanilla Evolved can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-evolved)

![Full Diamond Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee80f10e33a340d56de7e6ef6aa0d992b564872e.png)
![Blocks and Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd63d418cb86f00d6aee8fc6ba29bf9609aada02.png)
